steps.title: Identify the matching factor
steps.content: So $x^7+y^5$ is a factor. That matches Choice A — $x^7 + y^5$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches Choice A — $x^7 + y^5$, $x^7 + y^5$. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so A.
